source: International Standard Bible Encyclopaedia (James Orr ed., 1915)
html:
kon-form', kon-form'-a-b'-l (summorphoo "to become or be like," or "of the same form"): Indicating an inner change of nature, working into the outward life (Ro 8:29; Php 3:10,21); while suschematizo, "fashioned according to" (Ro 12:21 the Revised Version (British and American), the King James Version. "conformed"), refers to that which is external.

�
